stemHtml: Which items should a passenger briefing in case of an imminent emergency landing include?

options.a: How to work the aircraft radio, emergency transponder squawk, telephone number of the competent search and rescue (SAR) center
options.b: How to read an emergency checklist, how to cut the engine, telephone number of the home airport
options.c: Nature of the emergency, intentions, safety position, evacuation routes, actions after landing
options.d: Blood type of the other aircraft occupants, location of the first-aid kit
